entities.description: bookrag is a method or system being evaluated in the experiments against baseline methods
document qa tasks are the specific problems on which the efficiency and accuracy of bookrag and baseline methods are compared
baseline methods are the strong existing approaches used for comparison against bookrag in the experiments
efficiency is a metric used to evaluate the performance of bookrag and baseline methods
accuracy is a metric used to evaluate the performance of bookrag and baseline methods

relations.description: bookrag is evaluated for its efficiency and accuracy specifically on document qa tasks
bookrag is compared against several strong baseline methods in the experiments
the efficiency of bookrag is evaluated and compared in the experiments
the accuracy of bookrag is evaluated and compared in the experiments
the efficiency of baseline methods is evaluated and compared in the experiments
the accuracy of baseline methods is evaluated and compared in the experiments
efficiency is measured specifically on document qa tasks
accuracy is measured specifically on document qa tasks
